dsl_rule.translation_notes: Breakout entry modeled as close breaking above 12-month Donchian lower band (representing breakout from formation). Exit uses returns metric: target 30% profit or stop loss at -5%. Book states 54% fail in bull markets and 66% in bear markets to achieve 35% total move (5% loss + 30% gain). Pattern formation timing and location (L/C/H) are qualitative and cannot be expressed with quantitative indicators alone. Hold period set conservatively to 60 days for postbreakout analysis window.

source_rule_text: Breakout and postbreakout patterns analysis showing formation timing, breakout location distribution, and performance metrics
